title: epic mega super RPG
description: This is a RPG pack made so that you can Have a fun time in a epic fantasy wold with your friends
body:
this is a RPG pack
 it has a class and skill sytem as well as new mods and magic weppons mideivle weppons and a halfway lifesteel feature new structures and world gen make it perfect for a small sever or singlplayer hardcore world fave fun
